description: Playwright MCP tools for browser automation, screenshots, forms, and end-to-end testing workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Browser automation and end-to-end testing through Playwright MCP.
interface.longDescription: Connect DotCraft to Microsoft's Playwright MCP server for browser automation, page interaction, screenshots, form filling, and end-to-end testing workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Playwright MCP tools to inspect and interact with a web page.
